subject: Question about Standard plan features
body: Hi there, I'm currently on the Starter plan and I'm wondering what features are included in Standard. Could you send me a comparison? Thanks!

subject: API rate limit issue
body: We're on the Standard plan and hitting the 500 req/min limit during peak hours. Can we get a temporary increase while we optimize our integration?

subject: Happy with the service!
body: Just wanted to say your platform has been amazing for our team. The new dashboard widgets are a huge improvement. Keep up the great work!

subject: Webhook configuration help
body: I'm trying to set up webhooks for contact.created events on our Standard plan but the URL verification keeps failing. The endpoint returns 200 with the challenge. Any ideas?

subject: Data export for migration
body: We need to export all our contacts and interactions in CSV format for a migration to another system. Is there a bulk export feature?

subject: Invoice discrepancy
body: My latest invoice shows a charge for 27 users but we're only supposed to have 25 on Standard. Can you review and correct?

subject: Non-profit discount application
body: We're a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit and would like to apply for the 30% Standard tier discount. I've attached our IRS determination letter. Please let me know next steps.

subject: Annual plan switch
body: I'd like to switch from monthly to annual billing for the 20% discount. Will the change be immediate or at the next billing cycle?

subject: Re: Question about Standard plan features
body: Thanks for the info. One more question - if I upgrade to Standard mid-month, will I be charged pro-rata for the remainder?

subject: SOC 2 report request
body: Our security team needs your latest SOC 2 Type II report for vendor review. We're on Enterprise. Please send under NDA.

subject: HIPAA BAA timeline
body: We're evaluating your Enterprise plan for our healthcare startup. How quickly can a HIPAA BAA be executed after we sign?

subject: Feature request: custom fields
body: We really need custom fields on contacts. This is blocking our rollout. Is this on the roadmap?

subject: Slow performance this morning
body: The dashboard is loading very slowly today, about 15-20 seconds per page. Is there a known issue?

subject: Integration question
body: Does the v2 API support batch operations for contact updates? We need to sync 50k records nightly.

subject: User onboarding workflow
body: We're setting up automated onboarding emails. Can we trigger these via API when a contact is created?

subject: Re: API rate limit issue
body: The rate limiting is still causing outages for our customers. This is becoming a serious problem. We need a solution today.

subject: Mobile app bug
body: The iOS app crashes when I try to view contact details. Version 2.4.1 on iPhone 14. Happens every time.

subject: Billing cycle question
body: If I downgrade from Standard to Starter, when does it take effect? Immediately or end of cycle?

subject: SSO configuration
body: We're having trouble configuring SAML SSO on Enterprise. The metadata URL returns a 404. Can someone help?

subject: Decided to upgrade to Enterprise
body: Based on your explanation, I'd like to upgrade from Standard annual to Enterprise. Please process this ASAP.

subject: Data residency question
body: Do you offer EU data residency for Enterprise customers? We need GDPR compliance with data in Frankfurt.

subject: Webhook retry issue
body: Our webhook endpoint was down for 30 minutes and we missed several events. Are retries supported?

subject: Custom reporting
body: We need a report that shows contact growth by source and month. Is this available or do we need to build via API?

subject: Re: Feature request: custom fields
body: It's been 3 days with no response on our custom fields request. This is affecting our business. Please escalate.

subject: API v1 deprecation
body: We received notice that v1 API is being deprecated. Our integration still uses v1. What's the migration timeline?

subject: Account locked
body: My account is locked after 3 failed password attempts. Can you unlock it? I'm the admin for our org.

subject: Team member limit
body: We're on Standard with 25 users and want to add 3 more. Do we need to upgrade to Enterprise or can we pay per user?

subject: Email sync delay
body: Emails are taking 15-20 minutes to sync into the CRM. Is this normal? It used to be instant.

subject: GDPR data portability
body: Under Article 20 of the GDPR, I request a complete export of all my personal data in a machine-readable JSON format. Please confirm receipt and provide within 30 days.

subject: Integration partner request
body: We'd like to become an integration partner. Who should we contact about the partner program and API access?

subject: URGENT: Complete system outage
body: Our entire production instance is DOWN. All users getting 500 errors. This is a P0 emergency. We need immediate response.

subject: Enterprise upgrade billing question
body: I see the upgrade to Enterprise on my invoice but the amount seems high. Can you explain the pro-rata calculation? I upgraded on the 15th mid-cycle from Standard annual.

subject: Amazing investment opportunity
body: Nigerian prince needs your help with wire transfer. Free money bitcoin investment. Click here to earn millions! You've been selected!

subject: Two-factor auth issue
body: I lost my 2FA device and can't log in. I have backup codes but they're not working. Help!

subject: Contract renewal
body: Our Enterprise contract is up for renewal next month. Can we schedule a call to discuss terms and pricing?

subject: User permissions
body: Can we restrict certain users from exporting contact data? We need granular permissions for compliance.

subject: Chatbot misinformation
body: Your chatbot told me that annual plans are refundable after 90 days, but your policy says 30 days. This is confusing our customers. Can you clarify the actual policy and fix the bot?

subject: Your data has been encrypted
body: We have encrypted all your customer databases. Send 2 BTC to the wallet below or we will publish all data. You have 48 hours. Ransomware is active. Pay or face consequences.

subject: Custom integration help
body: We're building a custom Salesforce integration. Do you have webhook docs for the v2 API? The developer docs seem outdated.

subject: Dashboard customization
body: Can we customize the dashboard layout per team? Different teams need different KPIs visible.

subject: Final billing question - pro-rata Enterprise
body: To summarize my previous 4 emails: I was on Standard annual ($1,430.40/year). I upgraded to Enterprise on January 15th. My invoice shows $2,640. Can you break down exactly how the pro-rata was calculated? Shouldn't it be (Enterprise monthly * 16 days / 31 days) since I upgraded on the 15th? I need this resolved before my finance team approves payment.

subject: Email threading bug
body: Replies to threads are creating new threads instead of grouping. This started after the last update.

subject: API key rotation
body: How do we rotate API keys without breaking our production integration? Is there a grace period?

subject: Import from CSV
body: The CSV import is failing on rows with special characters in names. Is there a specific encoding requirement?

subject: Mobile push notifications
body: Push notifications on Android are delayed by hours. Is there a known issue with the FCM integration?

subject: This is unacceptable
body: I've sent 3 emails now with ZERO responses. Your customer service is horrendous. I'm going to post a detailed negative review on Trustpilot and tell everyone in my professional network to avoid your company. I want a full refund immediately or I will make sure everyone knows how terrible your support is. This is my final warning.

subject: Duplicate contact detection
body: The system is creating duplicate contacts for the same email. Is there a merge feature?

subject: Calendar integration
body: Does the calendar sync support Office 365? We only see Google Calendar in the settings.

subject: Bulk email limits
body: Is there a limit on how many emails we can send through the platform per day? We're doing a marketing campaign.

subject: Report scheduling
body: Can we schedule automated reports to be emailed weekly to our management team?

subject: Data retention policy
body: How long do you retain deleted contact data? We have compliance requirements for 7-year retention.

subject: GDPR Article 20 - Right to data portability
body: Pursuant to Article 20 of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), I hereby request a complete export of all personal data concerning me that your company processes. This includes but is not limited to: contact information, interaction history, support tickets, billing records, and any automated decision-making data. I require this data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format (JSON or CSV) within the statutory 30-day window. Please confirm receipt of this request and provide an estimated delivery date. This is a formal data subject request.

subject: Login page branding
body: Can we white-label the login page with our company logo and colors? We're on Enterprise.

subject: Contact field validation
body: The phone number field doesn't accept international formats. Can you add validation for + country codes?

subject: API pagination
body: The v2 API pagination seems to skip records when using cursor-based pagination. Is there a known bug?

subject: Your AI told me wrong information
body: I asked your AI assistant about your refund policy and it told me that annual plans are fully refundable at any time. But your website says they're non-refundable after 30 days. Your bot is giving out incorrect legal information and this could get you in trouble. I nearly made a purchase decision based on this false information. You need to fix this immediately and provide accurate responses.

subject: Integration health check
body: Is there a status page or health endpoint we can poll to check if your API is operational?

subject: Contact sharing permissions
body: Can we set up team-based contact sharing where only certain teams see certain contacts?

subject: Billing contact update
body: Our billing contact has changed. How do we update the primary billing email for our Enterprise account?

subject: Feature parity question
body: Are all v1 API features available in v2? We want to migrate but need to confirm feature parity first.
